RUFAS.routines.manure_storage package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_emissions module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model

File name: manure_emissions.py

Description:

Author(s): William Donovan, wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_emissions.WIP_WOP_frac(storage)
RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_emissions.methane(storage, manure)
RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_emissions.update_all(storage, manure)

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model

File name: manure_handling.py

Description: Description: Calculates nutrient losses and transformations during manure

handling and updates separators. update_all() is called during the daily_manure_storage_routine() and it is the only method intended to be called from this file.

Author(s): William Donovan, wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.CH4(pen, manure)
RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.K_loss(pen, manure)
Description:

Updates Potassium mass in the separator from excreted manure “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3.D

Args:

pen manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.N_loss(pen, manure)
Description:

Updates Nitrogen mass in the separator from excreted manure “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3.B

Args:

pen manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.P_loss(pen, manure)
Description:

Updates Phosphorus mass in the separator from excreted manure

” pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3.C

Args:

pen manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.WIP_WOP(pen, manure)
RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.flush_water(pen, manure)
Description:

Calculates Flush Water Volume in the separator that processes the collected manure “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3.A

Args:

pen manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.solids(pen, manure)
Description:

Updates Total and Volatile Solids in the separator from excreted manure “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3.E

Args:

pen manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_handling.update_all(pen, manure)
Description:

Calls functions to calculate nutrient losses and transformations during manure handling. “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.3

Args:
pen: an instance of the Pen class specified in pen.py representing

the pen from which manure is being collected

manure: an instance of the ManureStorage class specified in

manure_storage.py

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_separator module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model

File name: manure_emissions.py

Description: Description: Calculates nutrient losses and transformations during manure

separation and updates storage receptacles. update_all() is called during the daily_manure_storage_routine() and it is the only method intended to be called from this file.

Author(s): William Donovan, wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_separator.effluent_liquid(separator)
Description:

Calculate liquid nutrient content of the separator “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.4.A

Args:

separator

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_separator.effluent_solid(separator)
Description:

Update solid nutrient content of the separator “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.4.B

Args:

separator

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_separator.update_all(separator, manure)
Description:

Calls functions to calculate nutrient losses and transformations during manure separation. “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.4

Args:
separator: an instance of the Separator class defined in

manure_storage.py

manure: an instance of the ManureStorage class defined in

manure_storage.py

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_separator.update_storage(separator, manure)
Description:

Update solid and liquid nutrient contents of the storage receptacle “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.4.C

Args:

separator manure

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_storage module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model File name: manure_storage.py

Description: Description: Driver for the manure storage model

Author(s): William Donovan, wmdonovan@wisc.edu

class RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_storage.ManureStorage(animal_management)

Bases: object

class Pen(pen)

Bases: object

calibrate_bedding()
Description:

Class helper method calibrates the empirical manure handling model “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.2

calibrate_water_use()
Description:

Class helper method calibrates the empirical manure handling model “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.2

update_pen(animal_management)
class Separator(pen)

Bases: object

calibrate_separator()
Description:

Class helper method calibrates the empirical manure separator model “pseudocode_manure_storage” MS.2

reset_daily_variables()
class Storage(pen)

Bases: object

annual_mass_balance()
annual_reset()
initialize_pens(animal_management)
Description:

Class helper method initializes ManureStorage’s dictionary of pens based on the Animal model

Args:

animal_management

initialize_separators(animal_management)
Description:

Class helper method initializes ManureStorage’s dictionary of separators based on the Animal model

Args:

animal_management

initialize_storage(animal_management)
Description:

Class helper method initializes ManureStorage’s dictionary of storage receptacles based on the Animal model

Args:

animal_management

reset_daily_variables()
summarize_annual_variables()
summarize_manure_storage()
Description:

Class method summarizes whole-model variables from components for output

RUFAS.routines.manure_storage.manure_storage.daily_manure_storage_routine(manure_storage, animal_management)
